title: BDLawCorpus: Browser-Based Archival Snapshot Tool for Bangladeshi Legal Texts
description: BDLawCorpus is a Chrome extension for capturing browser-rendered DOM text from bdlaws.minlaw.gov.bd for academic research in digital humanities, legal informatics, and low-resource language studies. It extracts text via element.textContent only, preserves immutable content_raw as the anchor for derived outputs, and explicitly disclaims legal validity, Gazette equivalence, and ML training suitability.
